reviews.review_description: Its confusing to set up ur roms and cabinets and on discord its a ghost town no support really think this dev is bout done with this still glitch at times and not much content got 1 update 4 months ago and wasn't one of the things needed right away....I say pass on this ..was hoping was gonna be good.. now my x-arcade machine is bought sits and collects dust... dev ain't even responded to any of these reviews whats that tell ya 👌🤦

This app is awesome. Yes it takes some work getting roms to work but thats MAME itself not this app. Once you figure out MAME this app is great 👍

My suggestion to those having issues is to install MAME on PC and get whatever game your trying to run to work on PC MAME first as if it won't work there it won't work here either. Once you understand how MAME works and that many Roms require other files to run its actually not difficult and you can have tons of old-school arcade games installed in no time

reviews.review_title: This sucks as much as anything sucks
reviews.review_description:
Yea I don't have hours to set up something I had to pay to get.  What a rip of
 Giant P.O.S! Do not pay money for this. I got it for free and  someone should pay me for the headache and waisted time.

After installing the Arcade Ranger app, I spent a few hours online trying to find ways to get it to work. I've managed to download a MAME rom, I put it into the appropriate folder (actrually tried all of them) using the specific instructions from X-Arcade. I can go up (virtually) to a machine within the game, pull up the menu to select the specific ROM zip file, and select CONFIRM, then select PLAY; and then nothing happens...Just staring at a blank black screen with nothing functioning. No movements within the game or any other function works until a quit the game. There are tons of "tutorial-ish" sites/forums out there. I tried a bunch and none of it works. I'm suspecting that there might be some MAME core that needs to be installed using Sidequest VR, the using Retro Arch to load the emulator so the zip ROM can be accessed. Sounds like something you can do easily? Yeah, very straightforward. Takes minutes....NOT!
Honestly, i was frustrated at first. I took a step back, went step by step and it worked perfect. With a little patience this app is worth every penny and then some.

reviews.review_title: Works ok but a lot of issues
reviews.review_description:
You will absolutely need to follow the instructions of a YouTube monkey to get roms loaded correctly and even then, many roms don't work. There’s no info on how to find more cores unless you dig around on the internet and even then it’s difficult to figure out. One video out there nets you snes if you want it though. 

Using with the arcade2tv-xr is great and the game plays well enough, but there are issues with the trackball that makes those games unplayable or the setting changes will mess up your games overall. 

This app is not for those without patience but the outcome is worth it if you want the chance to have an arcade experience at home. 

Oh graphics are great and in mixed reality it looks stellar. 

Final thought: The discord they encourage you to join is pretty useless and there’s almost no help at all for queries and concerns.

reviews.review_title: Rough around the edges with potential.
reviews.review_description:
The VR arcade emulation community has been around for years now but this is the first "official" Meta app I've seen. There are other more mature offerings out there like Age Of Joy with detailed environments, and hundreds of beautiful and accurate looking cabinets. This app has a long way to go to achieve something comparible. However, here are some things Arcade Ranger has going for it.
1. Integration with the X-Arcade2TVVX.
2. Compabilitity with multiple emulators.
3. Trackball support.
4. Multi-player environments.
Here are things I'd like to see as this app evolves...
1. Ability to support imported 3d cabinet meshes and better texture mapping capabilities to more accurately reflect the cabinets. Right now the cabinets and screens look very 'flat' which distracts from the immersion.
2. Ability to add "rooms" and more cabinets without bogging down the CPU. 
3. Better lighting/glow effects, and reflections.

Overall, great start AR team! Looking forward to seeing where this goes.
Glitch where you cannot select anything    Bummer

This App is 100% amazing, up there with Spatial Ops, DD Cabin, and Encounters. The MR is crazy

It took me a few days to understand, but holy eff it was Worth it, if they keep Improving it this will be unreal

I luv this

I really Like This Software & was Really Keen to set up my NEW Arcade2TV-XR & Show How Retro Arcades Were Played in my day.
After having a Go Trying to make my own arcade I noticed anymore than about 30-40 arcade machines you place in the Game. The program Starts to Bug Out. 
It took me 2 hours & now starting again is on the cards.
I couldn't Get M.R. mode to Work. Didn't matter howany time I pressed 1 & 2 player buttons together & double checking the Leads.
It Feels Like Abandonware & I really Wanted this Because Time Capsule Although Good, doesn't Support the Arcade2tv unless It's Wired to a P.C. 
Such a Shame...

reviews.review_title: Buggy. Not worth getting for X Arcade
reviews.review_description: I got the X Arcade stick that comes with a copy of this game. But I was disappointed that this game is super broken. The game starts and I have no idea what to do. I waited for the title screen to load only to find out by trial and error that I needed to move forward. MR mode has no prompts making it hard to learn. The game hangs when adding NPCs. The Donkey King arcade spawns backwards on the arcade stick. Games don't start, but freeze. This is a broken mess.

OK first message is to the user a bit of patience and you will realise this a totally worth it purchase and message to developer your average user isn't going to go on discord to figure out how to upload roms it needs to be a lot easier with a more detailed guide

developer_response.body:
Hi Martin,

Thank you for your thoughtful feedback! We’re excited to hear you’ve been enjoying Arcade Ranger

Thank you for your thoughtful feedback! We’re excited to hear you’ve been enjoying Arcade Ranger.

We understand that getting the most out of your setup can sometimes feel a bit challenging at first. While we don’t provide support for third-party content, we’re committed to improving the overall user experience and will work on refining our guides to ensure everything is as straightforward as possible.

If there’s anything else we can assist you with or if you have more suggestions, please don’t hesitate to reach out. We truly appreciate your support and input—it helps us continue to grow and provide the best gaming experience for our community.

Thank you for being a part of the Pumpkin VR journey!

Best regards,
Pumpkin VR Team

reviews.review_description: The customization feature is incredible! Every machine feels like my own unique creation. The level of freedom is just fantastic!

reviews.review_title: Relive the Golden Age of Arcades!
reviews.review_description:
This game really brings back memories of hanging out at the arcade as a kid. The ability to customize your own arcade space in VR is such a cool feature—it’s like building your own little retro paradise!

The MR mode is a nice touch too, blending reality with the game for an extra layer of immersion.

The devs mentioned they’re planning to add a Campaign Mode and more features in future updates, which sounds awesome.

I did recommend this game for all people it's just a good game and fun to play 🎮

developer_response.body:
Hi Mitchell,

Thank you so much for your kind words and for taking the time to share your experience! We're thrilled to hear that Arcade Ranger brings back those nostalgic arcade memories and that you're enjoying the customization features and MR mode.

Our team is working hard on the Campaign Mode, and we’re excited to share more updates on it soon. Your support and enthusiasm mean the world to us—feel free to share any suggestions or feedback as you continue to play.

Thanks again for being part of our journey! 🎮

reviews.review_description: It's working now! I got an update and it finally loaded. While it definitely shows promise, it needs more polish. I'm excited to see where this goes!

We truly appreciate your thoughts about needing more polish—we’re always working to improve and refine the experience. Your support means a lot to us, and we’re excited to share what’s next in future updates!

If you have any other suggestions or ideas, don’t hesitate to let us know. Thanks again for being a part of our journey!

Best regards,

reviews.review_description: Just to add roms to each arcade machine sold me there's alot more hidden  💎 and for a beta wow 👌 👏 a game vr needs

reviews.review_description: I'm going to try to get a refund. There's literally nothing to explain anywhere how I'm suppose to use this app. If this is "beta" - then they shouldn't be selling it for $15.00.

developer_response.body:
Hi Mitch,

We’re really sorry to hear about your frustration, and we completely understand your concerns. As an Early Access title, Arcade Ranger is still a work in progress, and we acknowledge that the current setup instructions could be clearer.

The good news is that our team is already working on an improved tutorial system, which will be live this week. We also encourage you to join our Discord https://discord.gg/XPaFHDwGw9—it’s a great resource for detailed guides and community support.

We’re committed to making Arcade Ranger the best experience possible, and we appreciate your honest feedback. Thank you for giving us a chance, and we hope you’ll reconsider in the future!

Not all features and mainly no games to play in it. It supposedly allows Roms for games but I can’t see how you’d get them in there and none are included. 

I’m still hopeful it eventually works!

reviews.review_description: Please add support for other brands bluetooth or usb controllers. It is even mentioned that there is gamepad support. Using original quest controllers is not how these games were designed be played. It ruins otherwise perfect game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your valuable feedback and for sharing your thoughts with us. We completely understand the importance of gamepad support for an optimal experience, especially for games designed with traditional controllers in mind.

Our team is actively exploring ways to enhance controller compatibility, and your suggestion for broader Bluetooth or USB gamepad support has been noted. We’re committed to improving the experience and ensuring that Arcade Ranger is as enjoyable as possible for everyone.

Thank you again for your input and support—it means a lot to us! Stay tuned for future updates, and feel free to share any other ideas you might have.

Best regards,
